reviews.comment:
Muy bueni, tiene de todo, a veces se espera bastante para ser atendido. El aparato para inflar las cubiertas siempre en buen estado, al igual que los baños.

(Translated by Google)
Very good, it has everything, although sometimes the wait to be served is quite long. The tire inflator is always in good working order, as are the restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Ideal para quienes vivimos cerca al tener un YPF full. Largas colas para cargar nafta al formar parte del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for those of us who live nearby, as there's a full YPF station. Long lines for gas, however, since it's part of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina).
